--- 
title: |
  <img src="./images/liquid_scale.jpg" width="250px" style="margin-left:5%; margin-right:5%"/>
  Histograms of Patient ABX and Probiotic Expsures
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| label: library_data_imports

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

fiber_cohort <- readRDS("../public_data/fiber_data/all_metadata_fiber.RDS")
all_metadata_fiber <- read.csv("../data/fiber_data/full_metadata_no_phi.csv")  %>%
  filter(record_id %in% fiber_cohort$record_id)%>%
  select(c(abx_6mo, abx_3mo, pbx_now)) %>%
  mutate(
    abx_6mo = case_when(
      abx_6mo == 0 ~ "0 weeks",
      abx_6mo == 1 ~ "1 to 2 weeks",
      abx_6mo == 3 ~ "3 t 5 weeks",
      abx_6mo == 5 ~ "More than 5 weeks",
      .default = "Unknown"
    ),
    abx_3mo = case_when(
      abx_3mo == 0 ~ "0 weeks",
      abx_3mo == 1 ~ "1 to 2 weeks",
      abx_3mo == 3 ~ "3 t 5 weeks",
      abx_3mo == 5 ~ "More than 5 weeks",
      .default = "Unknown"
    ),
    pbx_now = case_when(
      pbx_now == 0 ~ "No",
      pbx_now == 1 ~ "Yes",
      pbx_now == 3 ~ "Not sure what Probiotics Are",
      .default = "Unknown"
    ),
    abx_6mo = factor(abx_6mo, levels = c("0 weeks", "1 to 2 weeks", "3 t 5 weeks", "More than 5 weeks", "Unknown")),
    abx_3mo = factor(abx_3mo, levels = c("0 weeks", "1 to 2 weeks", "3 t 5 weeks", "More than 5 weeks", "Unknown")),
    pbx_now = factor(pbx_now, levels = c("No", "Yes", "Not sure what Probiotics Are", "Unknown"))
      
  )

```


```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| include: true
#| label: pbx_usage

ggplot(all_metadata_fiber, aes(x = pbx_now)) +
  geom_bar(
    binwidth = 2,           
    fill = "#68a378",       
    color = "white",
    stat = 'count',        
    alpha = 0.8            
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Probiotics Usage",
    subtitle = "At time of Survey",
    x = "Current Probiotic Use",
    y = "Number of Patients"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    stat = "count", 
    aes(label = after_stat(count)), 
    vjust = -0.5, 
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| include: true
#| label: abx_usage

ggplot(all_metadata_fiber, aes(x = abx_3mo)) +
  geom_bar(
    binwidth = 2,           
    fill = "#68a378",       
    color = "white",
    stat = 'count',        
    alpha = 0.8            
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Antibiotics Usage",
    subtitle = "3 Months before survey",
    x = "Weeks of Antibiotics Exposure",
    y = "Number of Patients"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    stat = "count", 
    aes(label = after_stat(count)), 
    vjust = -0.5, 
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
